full_text:
Gu Tan (Zimo) 顧譚 (子默)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Tan (顧譚), styledZimo (子默). Advised Sun Deng with Zhuge Ke, Zhang Xiu, and Chen Biao. Exiled as a supporter of Sun He. Gu Tan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Gu Tan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
